description: claudster harness loop, auto-activated on install: relay.md session-resume injection (SessionStart + PreCompact), a session-end nudge + token-usage digest (Stop), post-edit lint (PostToolUse on Edit/Write), and a deterministic safety guard (PreToolUse on Bash/Edit/Write/MultiEdit) that blocks secret/catastrophic writes and asks before destructive shell/lockfile/CI changes (escape hatch: .claudster/config.toml [guard] allow). All handlers are pure-Python and cross-platform; they require `python` on PATH.
